pages.translation: A little girl lived in the village.

pages.hebrew: סָבְתָא נָתְנָה לָהּ כּוֹבַע אָדוּם יָפֶה.
pages.translation: Grandmother gave her a beautiful red hat.

pages.hebrew: יוֹם אֶחָד הַלְּכָה הַיַּלְדָּה לְבַקֵּר אֶת סָבְתָא.
pages.translation: One day, the girl went to visit grandmother.
On the way, she met a big wolf.
"Where are you going?" asked the wolf.

pages.hebrew: "אֲנִי הוֹלֶכֶת לְבַקֵּר אֶת סָבְתָא," עָנְתָה הַיַּלְדָּה.
pages.translation: "I'm going to visit grandmother," answered the girl.
A hunter came to save the wolf.

pages.hebrew: מֵאָז הִיא תָּמִיד שָׁמְרָה עַל עַצְמָהּ.
pages.translation: Since then, she always took care of herself.
